description_long: This spice rack consists of two wooden shelves mounted one above the other, each holding a variety of kitchenware and spice containers. The upper shelf displays two large, round jars with reddish-brown lids, accompanied by a set of small spice shakers and a pepper grinder. The lower shelf holds a stack of plates, several cups, and three transparent canisters. Hanging from the underside of the lower shelf are various kitchen utensils, including a whisk, grater, ladle, spatula, and a quilted pot holder. The overall design is practical and compact, with items neatly arranged for easy access. The materials appear to be primarily wood, glass, metal, and plastic, giving the rack a modern yet functional appearance.
description: A two-tiered wooden spice rack with jars, plates, cups, and hanging kitchen utensils, arranged for easy access. The rack features a mix of glass, metal, and plastic components.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shelves, jars, plates, cups, and all hanging utensils clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the alignment of jars and plates, with utensils mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the backs of jars and plates, with the hanging utensils and pot holder more visible from the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the stacked plates and cups, with the hanging utensils and pot holder partially visible.
